subject: Can't log into portal
message: My computer is acting weird. It is not letting me log into the portal. I don't know if I am not typing in the correct password, and now I got a notification that I successfully logged in from a Mac device in France, but I still could not get into the portal.

subject: Slow computer, need help
message: My laptop has been really slow the past two days, taking forever to open anything. I also noticed my email shows I sent a message to the whole finance team yesterday afternoon, but I don't remember sending that. Might have been on autopilot. Can someone look at my computer when they get a chance.

subject: URGENT - someone hacked my account, need help ASAP
message: I think my account has been hacked!! I tried to log in this morning and it won't let me, it just keeps saying my password expired and I need to set a new one. I never got any email telling me this was going to happen. This is really scary, please help immediately, I don't know what's going on with my account.

subject: I clicked a phishing link and entered my password
message: I got an email that looked like it was from IT asking me to verify my account. I clicked the link and it took me to a login page that looked normal, so I entered my username and password. After I submitted it, the page gave an error and now I'm worried it wasn't real. I haven't been able to log into my actual account since. This happened about 20 minutes ago.

subject: Printer on 3rd floor out of paper
message: The printer near the finance department on the 3rd floor is out of paper. Can someone refill it when they have a chance? Not urgent, people are just using the one on the 2nd floor for now.

subject: Weird pop-up
message: Got a weird pop-up yesterday saying my antivirus needed an update, clicked it to update. Computer's been fine since then I think, just wanted to mention it in case it matters.

subject: Coworker asked about a file
message: A coworker from another department messaged me asking about a file I supposedly shared with them last week, but I don't remember sharing anything with them. Probably just a mix up on their end but figured I'd mention it.

subject: EMERGENCY - all my files are gone
message: I can't find any of my files!! Everything is gone from my desktop, this is a disaster, I have a deadline today. Please help right now, I think I've lost everything.

subject: My computer is completely dead, need help NOW
message: My laptop won't turn on at all, screen is completely black, nothing happens when I press the power button. This is urgent I have a client call in an hour.

subject: All files on shared drive have .locked extension
message: Every file on the shared team drive now has a .locked extension and won't open. There's a text file in the folder demanding payment to unlock everything. This started about 10 minutes ago and is spreading to more folders.

subject: Unauthorized admin account created
message: I was reviewing our user list and found a new admin-level account that none of us created, with a username we don't recognize. It was created two days ago and has already been used to log in three times.

subject: Need Excel installed on new laptop
message: I got a new laptop last week and it doesn't have Excel installed yet. Could someone install it when they get a chance? No rush, I've been using Google Sheets in the meantime.

subject: Monitor flickering
message: My second monitor has been flickering on and off for the past couple days. Still usable, just annoying. Whenever someone has time to take a look would be great.

subject: Question about my account
message: I had a question about my account but now I don't remember what it was. Can someone reach out?

subject: Is this email safe?
message: I got an email asking me to update my payment info for a subscription renewal. It looks legit but I wanted to check with someone before clicking anything.

subject: How do I set up two-factor authentication?
message: I keep hearing I should turn on 2FA for my work account but I'm not sure how to do it. Can someone walk me through it or point me to instructions?

subject: Is it okay to use my personal laptop for work?
message: My work laptop is being repaired and I was wondering if it's okay to use my personal laptop to access email and files in the meantime, or if that's against policy.

subject: Coworker asked me to bypass approval for a payment
message: Someone claiming to be our CFO emailed asking me to process a wire transfer urgently and skip the usual approval steps since he's traveling. Something about this feels off, wanted to check before doing anything.

subject: Weird text after clicking a link
message: I clicked a link in a text message that looked like it was from our IT department about a system update. The page took a few seconds to load then showed an error, so I closed it. Not sure if I should be worried or if this happens sometimes.

subject: Old laptop behaving strangely before I return it
message: I'm returning my old work laptop next week since I got a new one. The old one has been running slow and sometimes the webcam light turns on by itself. Probably just old age but wanted to flag it before I hand it back.

subject: New vendor asking for access
message: A new vendor contact emailed asking for temporary access to our shared drive to review some documents for an upcoming project. I don't recognize their name but our manager mentioned we're working with a new vendor recently. Should I grant this?

subject: Extra step when logging in today
message: Login took a little longer than usual today, had an extra verification step I don't remember seeing before. Got in fine after that though so probably nothing.

subject: Being watched through my webcam??
message: The little light next to my webcam turned on for a second and I didn't open any video app. This is really creeping me out, is someone spying on me through my laptop?

subject: Can I use the same password for two accounts?
message: Is it against policy to use the same password for my work email and a work-related SaaS tool we use? Just want to make sure before I set it up that way.

subject: Software installation request
message: Could someone install Adobe Acrobat Pro on my machine? Need it for reviewing contracts. No rush, whenever is convenient.

subject: Access request follow-up
message: Following up on my request from last week, still waiting on access to the shared reporting folder.

subject: VPN keeps disconnecting
message: My VPN connection keeps dropping every 20-30 minutes today, having to reconnect constantly. Making it hard to get work done.

subject: Issue from earlier
message: Wanted to follow up on the thing I mentioned to my manager last week. Not sure if it ever got submitted as a ticket. Can you check?

subject: I'm locked out and someone is sending emails as me
message: I can't get into my email, my password stopped working this morning. A coworker just called me because they got an email from my account asking them to buy gift cards, but I never sent that. I also noticed my recovery phone number was changed to one I don't recognize.

subject: Strange large uploads from my computer overnight
message: Our IT dashboard flagged that my workstation uploaded almost 40GB of data to an external server last night between 2 and 4am. I was asleep and definitely didn't do this. The destination is a domain none of us recognize. It looks like it's still transferring right now.
